tracks.meaning: the central or most important part of an organ or body structure, such as the core of an apple or the Earth's core
a single processing unit within a multi-core processor that executes instructions independently
the central layer of the Earth beneath the mantle, composed primarily of iron and nickel
the central or most important part of a company's business or strategy
the central part of a fruit containing the seeds, typically removed before eating
the essential or fundamental part of a system or application around which other elements are built
to remove the central part or seeds from a fruit or vegetable
a curriculum of essential subjects that all students are required to study
the main body or central force of an armed unit or military formation
used as an intensifier or expression of emphasis, as in 'to the core' meaning fundamentally or completely
a type of computer memory used for temporary data storage and processing
the internal mold or cavity used in casting to form a hollow space in a metal part
